events.name: onFormatChanged
events.description: Fired when use_paragraph_format has been changed.

functions.name: getReplyPosition
functions.description: Retrieve a pref that sets reply position.

functions.name: getUseParagraph
functions.description: Retrieve default compose style (paragraph or body)

functions.name: setUseParagraph
functions.description: Set Paragraph or Body Text format in composer

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: True sets Paragraph format; False sets Body Text format
